lessons.title: When Things Go Wrong 🔥
lessons.description: Don't let your app crash! Learn to anticipate and announce errors.

lessons.title: Throwing Errors ⚾️
lessons.description: How a function officially warns Swift that a failure occurred.

lessons.title: Catching Errors 🧤
lessons.description: Use the do-catch block to peacefully resolve a thrown error.

lessons.title: The 'try?' Shortcut 🩼
lessons.description: When you don't care *why* it failed, you just want an Optional.
